stage1_intro.problem: Current material flow causes a 20% delay in assembly processes.
stage1_intro.goals: Redesign layout to minimize travel distance and improve overall factory throughput.

stage2_framework.objectives: Reduce cycle time by 15% without structural changes to the building.

stage3_solution.results: Achieved a 22% reduction in cycle time and improved worker ergonomics.

stage1_intro.problem: Unpredictable bottlenecks forming at the stamping press queue.
stage1_intro.goals: Build a responsive digital twin simulation to optimize routing schedules.

stage2_framework.objectives: Increase machine utilization by 10% and reduce WIP inventory.
constraints: No new capital equipment purchases allowed
Models must be validated against historical shift data

stage3_solution.results: Identified a buffer resizing strategy that increased total throughput by 14%.

stage1_intro.problem: High variance in cycle times causing downstream starvation.
stage1_intro.goals: Standardize work instructions and balance the production line.

stage2_framework.objectives: Establish reliable standard times for all 15 assembly sub-tasks.
constraints: Operator fatigue must be accounted for
Strict adherence to union evaluation rules

stage3_solution.results: Re-balanced 3 workstations, dropping the average cycle time variance by 40%.

stage1_intro.problem: Excessive corrugated cardboard waste costing $200k annually.
stage1_intro.goals: Apply Lean Six Sigma DMAIC framework to minimize material scrap.

stage2_framework.objectives: Reduce cardboard scrap rate from 8% to under 3%.
constraints: Cannot alter the primary product box dimensions
Must use existing automated folding machines

stage3_solution.results: Adjusted folding machine calibration, saving $150k in the first year.

stage1_intro.problem: Rising transportation costs due to inefficient warehouse routing.
stage1_intro.goals: Develop a mathematical model to optimize distribution paths.

stage2_framework.objectives: Minimize weekly transportation costs while maintaining 95% SLA delivery times.
constraints: Fleet size is fixed at 50 trucks

stage3_solution.results: Proposed new regional hub routes reducing total fleet mileage by 12%.
